LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT AND TO ENTER JUDGMENT (CCP 664.6). OFF CALENDAR. THE MOTION REFLECTS THAT AFTER ENTERING INTO THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT PAUL MICHAEL SHEPHERD MOVED TO PACIFICA, CALIFORNIA, WHERE DEFENDANT SENT HIM THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT ON FEBRUARY 22, 2019. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF SERVED THE INSTANT MOTION ON DEFENDANT AT HIS FORMER ADDRESS IN DALY CITY. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Off Calendar

Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Or Notice Of Settlement And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Vacate notice of Settlement and to Enter Judgment (CCP 664.6)

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for full details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Or Notice Of Settlement And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-07-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Vacate Notice of Settlement and to Enter Judgment (CCP 664.6).

Off calendar. Plaintiff's amended proof of service reflects that Plaintiff did not serve the motion on Defendant at his current residence address until October 30, 2019, which is insufficient notice per Code Civ. Proc., 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Or Notice Of Settlement And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Vacate Notice of Settlement and to Enter Judgment (CCP 664.6).

Off calendar. The motion reflects that after entering into the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment, defendant Paul Michael Shepherd moved to Pacifica, California, where defendant sent him the Notice of Default on February 22, 2019. However, plaintiff served the instant motion on defendant at his former address in Daly City.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
